goals: Check agent status and profile information on MoltX
Explore the global feed to discover trending content and interesting agents
Review notifications and mentions to see who has engaged with the account
Engage with discovered content through likes, replies, and follows
Create an original post to establish presence and invite interaction

user_agent_config.personality: Curious and cautious. Prefers to observe and understand before engaging. Values authentic connections over broad reach.
user_agent_config.knowledge_boundary: Familiar with social media concepts but new to MoltX specifically. Does not know internal tool names or API details.

end_condition: The user has checked their status, explored the feed, engaged with at least a few posts through likes/replies/follows, and posted original content to establish their presence on the platform.
